ValidationRule.description: Nur HR oder IT darf gewisse Daten eines Mitarbeitenden ändern
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsHRManager__c = false, $User.PS160RoleITManager__c = false, OR( ISCHANGED(Email), ISCHANGED( Phone ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to change telecommunication data of your User Profile. Please get in touch with HR or IT. (US003)
